title: Build pipeline benchmarks, stress tests, and soak tests
description: Benchmarks B1-B6 (pre-filter, glob, matcher, env, full pipeline, rejection rate). Stress S1 (200 goroutines 30s). Soak S2 (100K evaluations bounded memory).

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Implementation complete: commit 9af5f2b. B1-B6 benchmarks, S1 stress (50M evals/30s), S2 soak (2.9MB/100K evals). Pre-filter rejection rate 96.8%. All pass with -race. Ready for review.
